## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Impekable's growth strategies and explore potential collaboration or recommendations for marketing automation.](https://fathom.video/share/PxDCguFNvgJLhDaHUmprmdsygfzxkuux?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Impekable shifted from 15-20 project-based clients to 2-3 long-term, high-value retainers (\~$2M/year each)](https://fathom.video/share/PxDCguFNvgJLhDaHUmprmdsygfzxkuux?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Marcel advises focusing on high-quality outbound efforts over SEO/content for Impekable's business model](https://fathom.video/share/PxDCguFNvgJLhDaHUmprmdsygfzxkuux?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Pek is pursuing Google Cloud partnership certification to open new lead generation channels](https://fathom.video/share/PxDCguFNvgJLhDaHUmprmdsygfzxkuux?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Speaking engagements and building thought leadership could be effective for Impekable's growth](https://fathom.video/share/PxDCguFNvgJLhDaHUmprmdsygfzxkuux?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

## Topics

### Impekable's Current Business Model

  - [Shifted from 15-20 project-based clients to 2-3 long-term, million-dollar retainers](https://fathom.video/share/PxDCguFNvgJLhDaHUmprmdsygfzxkuux?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Operates like a "collective of highly paid consultants," assembling teams for large projects](https://fathom.video/share/PxDCguFNvgJLhDaHUmprmdsygfzxkuux?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Example client: Pentair (5-year engagement, $2M+/year spend)](https://fathom.video/share/PxDCguFNvgJLhDaHUmprmdsygfzxkuux?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [Strengths in strategic digital product development, UX design, and IoT integration](https://fathom.video/share/PxDCguFNvgJLhDaHUmprmdsygfzxkuux?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)

### Marketing Challenges and Opportunities

  - [Pre-COVID advantage: Bay Area location, direct access to tech companies](https://fathom.video/share/PxDCguFNvgJLhDaHUmprmdsygfzxkuux?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Post-COVID: Lost location advantage, exploring marketing automation](https://fathom.video/share/PxDCguFNvgJLhDaHUmprmdsygfzxkuux?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [Pek lacks in-house marketing expertise and budget for a large team](https://fathom.video/share/PxDCguFNvgJLhDaHUmprmdsygfzxkuux?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [Exploring partnership strategy: Google Cloud certification by end of year](https://fathom.video/share/PxDCguFNvgJLhDaHUmprmdsygfzxkuux?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Goal: Leverage Google Cloud partnership for leads in 2025, focusing on AI consulting](https://fathom.video/share/PxDCguFNvgJLhDaHUmprmdsygfzxkuux?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)

### Marcel's Recommendations

  - [High-quality outbound efforts more suitable than SEO/content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/PxDCguFNvgJLhDaHUmprmdsygfzxkuux?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Focus on packaging shift: From $2M custom engagements to more repeatable $20-30k/month packages](https://fathom.video/share/PxDCguFNvgJLhDaHUmprmdsygfzxkuux?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Explore speaking engagements and thought leadership to build personal brand](https://fathom.video/share/PxDCguFNvgJLhDaHUmprmdsygfzxkuux?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Leverage success stories to create FOMO and drive workshop attendance](https://fathom.video/share/PxDCguFNvgJLhDaHUmprmdsygfzxkuux?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Build own distribution channel, though challenging and time-consuming](https://fathom.video/share/PxDCguFNvgJLhDaHUmprmdsygfzxkuux?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)

### fwd.digital's Services

  - [Typical engagement: $10k/month, producing 50,000 words of content](https://fathom.video/share/PxDCguFNvgJLhDaHUmprmdsygfzxkuux?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
  - [Target clients: Companies with product-market fit, trying to scale](https://fathom.video/share/PxDCguFNvgJLhDaHUmprmdsygfzxkuux?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
  - [Services expand beyond content to other areas](https://fathom.video/share/PxDCguFNvgJLhDaHUmprmdsygfzxkuux?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
  - [Example client: Hagen (10,000 programmatic pages project)](https://fathom.video/share/PxDCguFNvgJLhDaHUmprmdsygfzxkuux?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Pek to explore speaking opportunities and conferences on digital transformation](https://fathom.video/share/PxDCguFNvgJLhDaHUmprmdsygfzxkuux?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [Consider developing a hand-cranked process to test messaging before scaling](https://fathom.video/share/PxDCguFNvgJLhDaHUmprmdsygfzxkuux?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [Investigate high-quality outbound strategies targeting Google Cloud partners](https://fathom.video/share/PxDCguFNvgJLhDaHUmprmdsygfzxkuux?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
  - [Pursue Google Cloud partnership certification to set up for 2025 lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/PxDCguFNvgJLhDaHUmprmdsygfzxkuux?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Potentially revisit collaboration with Marcel once a scalable strategy is identified](https://fathom.video/share/PxDCguFNvgJLhDaHUmprmdsygfzxkuux?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
